title: We Got Turned Into An Anime Again
overview: Bakabon and his family are back in this new anime after 18 years of being off the air. Are they ready for this new era, or have things changed way too much?

title: This Is a Pain / I Want Women to Like Me
overview: Eel-Dog tries to wake everyone up for the show to start. / Mr. Policeman takes Bakabon's Papa, Eel-Dog and Rerere to a mixer.

title: We're Going to Be in a Movie / I Want a Third
overview: Bakabon and his family end up in a movie. / Bakabon's Papa decides that he wants a third child.

title: Microtransactions! The Genius Bakabon / Anthropomorphize It
overview: Bakabon's Papa is visited by two of his underclassmen. The first one can’t seem to stop paying for microtransactions and the second needs ideas for a new game featuring anthropomorphic characters.

title: We Test the Limits of Late Night!
overview: Bakabon's Papa and the others find out just how far they can go on late night shows.

title: Anime is Hard
overview: Bakabon's Papa decides he's going to become a manga artist so he can buy Bakabon a prime-time broadcast slot.

title: We'll Do a Presentation / I Want to Become a Popular Seiyuu
overview: One of Bakabon's Papa’s kouhais visits again and decides to make presentations about everything.

title: I Want Some Action / Eel-Dog's Memorial Service
overview: Mr. Policeman makes it clear that he wants to stand out more. / We get a glance at Eel-Dog’s personal life.

title: Mr. Policeman's Aptitude Test / Real Genius Bakabon
overview: Mr. Policeman gets assessed to see if he’s really fit for this job. / We get to see what a more realistic Bakabon would look like.

title: Genius Hajime
overview: Hajime makes a time machine and the family visits the future.

title: Goodbye, Everyone
overview: Bakabon and Hajime travel into the past to try to prevent their father from turning into an idiot.

title: This is the Actual Final Episode
overview: This is the actual final episode. We promise.
